headline: Elliott Management Is Betting Billions on Synopsys. Should You Buy SNPS Stock Too?
summary: Elliott’s multibillion‑dollar stake is essentially a high‑conviction vote that Synopsys’ AI and chip‑design moat can keep supporting a premium valuation.
